message:
Fix .gitignore for compiled binaries

Changes:
- Add *_zyth pattern (compiled benchmark binaries)
- Add .zig-cache/ pattern (Zig build cache)
- Remove *.zig pattern (was blocking source files!)

Now correctly ignores:
- benchmarks/string_concat_zyth
- benchmarks/fibonacci_zyth
- packages/runtime/.zig-cache/

files.patch:
@@ -49,10 +49,12 @@ dmypy.json
 # Zig build artifacts
 zig-cache/
 zig-out/
+.zig-cache/
 
 # Compiled binaries
 output
 fib_binary
+*_zyth
 /tmp/
 
 # UV
@@ -64,4 +66,3 @@ uv.lock
 # Zyth specific
 _prototype/
 *.zig.o
-*.zig
